news.t: StockSnips Unveils their first AI-powered ETF: NEWZ, now trading on Nasdaq

holdings.infoBox: NEWZ is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Krystal Biotech stock at 4.07%, NewMarket at 3.97%, Coherent at 3.65%, Public Service Enterprise Group at 3.51%, and Howmet Aerospace at 3.50%.

overview.description: The StockSnips AI-Powered Sentiment US All Cap ETF (NEWZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund pursues long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of US companies across various market capitalizations. The fund selects securities by blending Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Natural Language Processing (NLP) technologies. NEWZ was launched on Apr 12, 2024 and is issued by StockSnips.

data.title: StockSnips Unveils their first AI-powered ETF: NEWZ, now trading on Nasdaq
data.text: PITTSBURGH , April 12, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- StockSnips Inc., a leader in AI-powered investment strategies, announces the launch of its first ETF, NEWZ, now trading on (NASDAQ). StockSnips AI-powered S...
